title: Source Fetch Manifest — 2026-05-05 Playwright Crawl Run
description: Provenance manifest recording one automated source-fetch run on 2026-05-05 (tool: playwright-1.59.1). Logs 22 attempted source downloads from SSA, BLS, CBPP, and GAO with per-result url, HTTP status, ok flag, byte count, latency (ms), local output path, and (for parsed HTML) a table count. Summary: targetCount 22, okCount 14, failCount 8, totalBytes 744516. This is a process/provenance artifact documenting how the repository's external/SSA datasets were retrieved (and which fetches 403'd), not primary subject-matter data.
unit_of_observation: fetch attempt (one HTTP request to a source URL)

columns.name: fetchedAt
columns.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the crawl run started (2026-05-05T15:27:29.457Z).

columns.name: targetCount
columns.description: Number of URLs attempted in the run (22).

columns.name: totalBytes
columns.description: Sum of bytes downloaded across the run (744516).

columns.name: results[].ok
columns.description: Run-level success flag. NOTE: ok can be true even when status is 403/404 (the fetcher still wrote a small body / index page), so status is the authoritative signal of whether real content was retrieved.

columns.name: results[].bytes
columns.description: Bytes written for this result (0 when blocked).

columns.name: results[].out
columns.description: Absolute local output path the fetched content was written to (paths under the non-worktree repo root C:\Users\deskc\Documents\509dds-data).

columns.name: results[].tables
columns.description: For HTML pages parsed into *.tables.json, the number of tables extracted (0–1 observed).

update_cadence: Per fetch run (dated filename; a new manifest is emitted each crawl).
notes: Provenance/process artifact — a log of one fetch run, NOT primary subject data. Of 22 attempts, 8 hard-failed (status 403, bytes 0 — SSA statcomps .xlsx, BLS OEWS .zip) and several others returned ok:true despite 403/404 (small index/error bodies written), so okCount (14) overstates genuinely-retrieved sources; gate on status==200 and bytes>0 for real content. Output paths are absolute and point at the main repo checkout (C:\Users\deskc\Documents\509dds-data), not this worktree. Companion status notes live in data/MANUAL-FETCH-NEEDED.md (a status doc, not carded per repo convention). Successful 200 fetches feed the parsed JSON/HTML under data/ssa/oho and data/external.
